summary: Repair Chrome cookie import, browser-like API headers, and live Stripe saved-card checkout for OrderToGo.
reason: The published CLI could not import macOS Chrome cookies, was rejected by ordertogo.com without browser-like User-Agent, Origin, and Referer headers, and attempted a generated Braintree flow while the live checkout uses postmicmeshorder with Stripe saved-card auth.
validated_outcome: Build and vet passed. Live auth login --chrome imported cookies, live /m/api/* calls returned real responses instead of 403, and PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 dry-run produced a postmicmeshorder body matching a captured successful checkout.
